rulings.Case Title: SH LUNG 2SF LLC VS. ROBERTA BROOKS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 24, 2017, line 8. PLAINTIFF SH LUNG 2SF LLC's Motion To Enforce Settlement DENIED in part and GRANTED in part. Pursuant to Housing Authorities November 10, 2016 decision it appears that the tenant is not responsible for rent/daily damages above $25/month; and all the amounts over $25/month to be paid by the Housing Authority. Tenant to pay $175 to the landlord within 30 days of notice of entry of this order, representing tenant's portion of rent from August 2016 to February 2017. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P. VS. CARRIE JAMES ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, February 24, 2017, line 10. PLAINTIFF WESTSIDE COURTS HOUSING PARTNERS, L.P.'s MOTION TO STRIKE ANSWER TO COMPLAINT DENIED, nothing in CCP 415.46, 1174.25, 1174.3, 715.010 and 715.020 precludes the filing of the pre-judgment claim of right to possession in the absence of service of the blank pre-judgment claim form with the Summons and Complaint. Additionally, in this case Plaintiff named DOE defendants in the Complaint and prayed in the verified complaint for leave to amend as the true names of DOES become known (Complaint paragraph III). The true name of Terry Matthews is now known. Pursuant to the allegation, representation and prayer in the verified complaint Plaintiff would have to move to amend the complaint to name Terry Matthews as DOE. The Court will not engage in futile act of striking Mr. Matthews answer. = (501/REQ)
